response.justification: Candidate has 13+ years of broad full-stack experience and recent exposure to MCP code generators and agentic workflow tooling at re:cinq, which aligns with parts of the role. However, the resume shows limited demonstrated depth in production GenAI systems, RAG architectures, vector databases, or multi-agent frameworks, and Python is not listed among core skills. Cloud experience is present (AWS CDK) but not at the scale or breadth typical for a Staff Forward Deployed GenAI role.
strengths: Strong full-stack and polyglot engineering background spanning 13+ years
Recent hands-on work with MCP and agentic workflow infrastructure at re:cinq
Proven mentorship and technical leadership via workshops, talks, and open-source projects
concerns: No demonstrated production experience with RAG, vector databases, or LLM evaluation pipelines
Python not listed in core skills; AI/GenAI experience appears recent and shallow
Lacks evidence of customer-facing technical discovery or enterprise consulting delivery
